title.en: China-to-Montenegro Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入黑山：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入黑山：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Montenegro CE-aligned product legislation, EN/IEC safety and EMC expectations, REGAGEN and CGES interconnection governance, anti-islanding settings, and 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context versus China GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 baseline evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与黑山 CE 对齐产品法规、EN/IEC 安全与 EMC 要求、REGAGEN 与 CGES 并网监管、孤网防回送设置，以及中国 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 基准证据对照，置于230/400 V 50 Hz 电网背景下。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與黑山 CE 對齊產品法規、EN/IEC 安全與 EMC 要求、REGAGEN 與 CGES 併網監管、防孤島設定，以及中國 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 基準證據對照，置於230/400 V 50 Hz 電網背景下。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE scope determination, standards interpretation, REGAGEN approval, CGES connection permit, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Montenegro standards adoption and interconnection requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE适用范围裁定、标准适用裁定、REGAGEN批准、CGES接入许可、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行黑山标准采纳状况和并网要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE適用範圍裁定、標準適用裁定、REGAGEN批准、CGES接入許可、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行黑山標準採納狀況與併網要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Montenegro, the practical gates are CE-oriented conformity for in-scope low-voltage and EMC requirements, EN/IEC safety evidence such as IEC 62109, REGAGEN and CGES project and interconnection review, anti-islanding and protection settings, and evidence that China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 are technical baseline references only, not market authorization in Montenegro.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口黑山时，关键门槛包括适用范围内的低电压、EMC产品 CE 对齐合规，EN/IEC 安全证据如 IEC 62109，REGAGEN 与 CGES 项目及并网审查，防孤岛与保护整定，并确认中国 GB/T 37408 与 GB/T 19964 仅为技术基线依据而非黑山市场授权。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口黑山時，關鍵門檻包括適用範圍內的低電壓、EMC產品 CE 對齊合規，EN/IEC 安全證據如 IEC 62109，REGAGEN 與 CGES 項目及併網審查，防孤島與保護整定，並確認中國 GB/T 37408 與 GB/T 19964 僅為技術基線而非黑山市場授權。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
